pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB API version to ensure compatibility with modern build environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: While not strictly a JDK breaking change, older JAXB versions may have dependencies or behaviors incompatible with the updated ecosystem around Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `release` flag is the modern, recommended way to compile for a specific Java version, ensuring both source compatibility and bootstrap classpath alignment with the target JDK.
